meaning: n.椹揪鍔犳柉鍔犲矝(闈炴床宀涘浗)
examples: Madagascar is the most fascinating place I have ever been to.
Called by some the "island that time forgot", Madagascar is home to a vast array of unique, exotic creatures.
The only mammal added to the list this year was the Eastern Voalavo, a rodent that lives in the mountainous forests of Madagascar.
The 2009 coup has left Madagascar isolated by the international community and deprived of foreign aid.
They say the first article of Madagascar's constitution talks of the secularity of government.
